name: RPlog_Zik_and_Joh_Talk_p3
title: Defenders by Destiny
summary: Sitting together on the wing of Enb'Zik's starfighter, the Jedi Johanna te Danaan lets the Sullustan colonel handle her white-bladed lightsaber as their talk turns reflective. They laugh over the homicidal astromech Cricket before Zik shares the story of his lightsaber's crystal, a flawed early Jedi attempt gifted to his diplomat parents. Johanna, uncharacteristically vulnerable, asks whether she was a good commanding officer, confessing her humble Tatooine farm origins and chronic self-doubt, and Zik reassures her warmly, recalling how she kept her pilots alive. Igniting the borrowed blade at last, Zik muses that the war has cast them both into roles they never planned, suggesting the Force itself may have chosen them as the galaxy's needed defenders, and affirms again that she was a fine CO. Johanna offers him a wordless gesture of friendship through the Force and takes her leave to visit Doctor Finian, the two old war buddies parting with promises to stay in touch and stay safe.
